# Card Stack
An auto-cycling layered stack that keeps the top card in focus.
## Import
```tsx
import { CardStack } from "@/components/ui/card-stack";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<CardStack interval={4000} offset={12} name={undefined} role={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **interval** (number) — default: `4000`: Cycle interval (ms)
- **offset** (number) — default: `12`: Stack offset
- **name** (string): Name
- **role** (string): Role
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add card-stack
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/card-stack
```
